CCP4i2Reportphaser_MR_AUTO_report.CCP4i2ReportText: Patterson Pathology in NMOL analysis, possible coiled coil or other regular structure, view Patterson (TNCS PATT MAPS ON)

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: Elements and scores of current solution
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportText: Current best solution has spacegroup P 21 21 21

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Search ensembles and spacegroups
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
********************************************************************************************* *** Phaser Module: AUTOMATED MOLECULAR REPLACEMENT 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
** Steps: ** Cell Content Analysis ** Anisotropy correction ** Translational NCS correction ** Rotation Function ** Translation Function ** Packing ** Refinement ** Final Refinement (if data higher resolution than search resolution) ** Number of search ensembles = 2 ** Search Method: FAST ** Input Search Order: ** #1 Ensemble_1 ** #2 Ensemble_1 ** Automatic (best predicted) search order WILL be used
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.04 secs ( 0.04 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:27 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Cell content analysis
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: CELL CONTENT ANALYSIS 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Space-Group Name (Hall Symbol): P 21 21 21 ( P 2ac 2ab) Space-Group Number: 19 Unit Cell: 23.99 55.48 60.02 90.00 90.00 90.00
Composition is of type: PROTEIN MW to which Matthews applies: 7701 Resolution for Matthews calculation: 2.10
Z MW VM % solvent rel. freq. 1 7701 2.59 52.58 1.000 <== most probable 2 15403 1.30 5.15 0.004
Z is the number of multiples of the total composition In most cases the most probable Z value should be 1 If it is not 1, you may need to consider other compositions
Most probable VM for resolution = 2.2252 Most probable MW of protein in asu for resolution = 8976.39
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 1.46 secs ( 1.46 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:28 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre: ****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: TRANSLATIONAL NON-CRYSTALLOGRAPHIC SYMMETRY 2.8.3 *** ****************************************************************************************** Resolution of All Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Resolution of Selected Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4894) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Warning: Patterson Pathology in NMOL analysis, possible coiled coil or other regular structure, view Patterson (TNCS PATT MAPS ON) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ -------- TWINNING -------- tNCS/Twin Detection Table ------------------------- -Second Moments- --P-values-- Centric Acentric untwinned twin frac < 5% Theoretical for untwinned 3.00 2.00 including measurement error 3.00 2.00 Theoretical for perfect twin 2.00 1.50 Initial (data as input) 4.59 2.99+/-0.113 1 1 After Anisotropy Correction 4.42 2.94+/-0.113 1 1 After Anisotropy and tNCS ---n/a--- P-value < 0.01 for < 5% twinned is considered worth investigating Resolution for Twin Analysis (85% I/SIGI > 3): 2.81A (HiRes= 2.10A) Resolution of All Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Resolution of Selected Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4893) CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 3.79 secs ( 3.79 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:30 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: EXPECTED LLG OF ENSEMBLES 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Resolution of Data (Selected): 2.100 (2.1001) Number of Reflections (Selected): 4897 (4893) eLLG Target: 225
----------------- POLY-ALANINE ELLG -----------------
Resolution = 2.1001 Default RMSD = 0.1 0.2 0.4 0.8 1.6 3.2 Minimum solvent = 20% Maximum number of polyalanine residues = 87 (-full-) Alanine residues for eLLG target = 34
Table of Alanine Residues for eLLG Target ----------------------------------------- ---RMSD--- eLLG-target | 0.10 0.20 0.40 0.80 1.60 3.20 225 | 34 36 44 85 -full--full- 196 | 32 33 41 79 -full--full- 169 | 29 31 38 73 -full--full- 144 | 27 29 35 68 -full--full- 121 | 25 26 32 62 -full--full- 100 | 22 24 29 56 -full--full- 81 | 20 21 26 51 -full--full- 64 | 18 19 23 45 -full--full- 49 | 16 16 20 39 -full--full- 36 | 13 14 17 34 -full--full- 25 | 11 12 14 28 -full--full- 16 | 9 9 11 22 77 -full- 9 | 6 7 8 17 58 -full- 4 | 4 4 5 11 38 -full- 1 | 2 2 2 5 19 -full-
-------------- MONOMERIC ELLG --------------
Expected LLG (eLLG) ------------------- eLLG: eLLG of ensemble alone eLLG RMSD frac-scat Ensemble 308.3 0.410 0.48221 Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target -------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) eLLG-reso Ensemble 2.443 Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target: data collection ------------------------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) with perfect data eLLG-reso Ensemble 2.489 Ensemble_1
eLLG indicates that placement of a single copy of ensemble "Ensemble_1" should be easy
Expected LLG (eLLG): Chains --------------------------- eLLG: eLLG of chain alone eLLG RMSD frac-scat chain Ensemble 308.3 0.410 0.48221 " A" Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target: Chains ---------------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) eLLG-reso chain Ensemble 2.443 " A" Ensemble_1
-------------------- HOMO-OLIGOMERIC ELLG --------------------
